mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, customer_id, staff_id, rental_id, amount, payment_date FROM payment WHERE payment_date >= '2022-01-01' AND payment_date < '2022-08-01' ORDER BY payment_date DESC

SELECT payment_id, customer_id, staff_id, rental_id, amount, payment_date FROM payment WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND payment_date >= '2022-01-01' AND payment_date < '2022-08-01' ORDER BY payment_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (customer_id, staff_id, rental_id, amount, payment_date) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{staffId}, #{rentalId}, #{amount}, COALESCE(#{paymentDate}, now())) RETURNING payment_id
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', payment_date)::date AS month, COUNT(payment_id) AS transaction_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, ROUND(AVG(amount), 2) AS avg_amount, MIN(amount) AS min_amount, MAX(amount) AS max_amount, group_concat(DISTINCT customer_id::text) AS customer_ids FROM payment WHERE payment_date >= #{startDate} AND payment_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', payment_date) ORDER BY month

SELECT p.relname AS partition_name, p.partstrategy AS strategy, p.interval AS range_interval, p.relpages AS pages, pg_get_expr(p.relcudescs, p.relcudescrelid) AS range_boundary, CASE WHEN p.parttype = 'p' THEN 'range' WHEN p.parttype = 'i' THEN 'interval' ELSE 'other' END AS partition_type FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_partition p ON c.oid = p.parentid WHERE c.relname = 'payment' ORDER BY p.boundaries

WITH daily_revenue AS ( SELECT payment_date::date AS day, SUM(amount) AS revenue, COUNT(payment_id) AS transactions FROM payment WHERE payment_date >= #{startDate} AND payment_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY payment_date::date ) SELECT day, revenue, transactions, LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY day) AS prev_day_revenue, ROUND( (revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY day))::numeric / NULLIF(LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY day), 0) * 100, 2 ) AS day_over_day_change_pct, ROUND(AVG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 2) AS rolling_7day_avg, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank FROM daily_revenue ORDER BY day
